name: PRLX 93936
description: PRLX 93936 is selectively toxic to cancer cells.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in solid tumors.
mechanismOfAction: PRLX 93936 appears to inhibit mitochondrial outer membrane protein VDACs (voltage-dependent anion channels) 2 and 3, resulting in an oxidative, non-apoptotic cell death.
pharmacodynamics: PRLX 93936 shows robust and selective toxicity in a wide variety of tumor cell-lines, and causes complete tumor regression in mouse xenograft models of fibrosarcoma, pancreatic cancer, ovarian cancer, colon cancer, and melanoma.
